title: dao.py: full route rebuild on every DAO is O(N^2)
description:
src/lichen/rpl/dao.py:185-190 _rebuild_routes() clears and rebuilds all routes on every DAO. With N nodes, processing N DAOs costs O(N^2) path assemblies.

Fix: Incremental update - only rebuild routes for targets whose path changed (the target plus downstream dependents). Requires tracking reverse dependency graph.
